repo_signals: L3 smoke for platform.cloud.azure: AKS, Azure Functions consumption vs premium, Entra ID and managed identity, RBAC role assignments, Blob storage, App Service, Bicep and ARM, resource groups

retrieval_query: azure aks managed identity entra id rbac role assignment azure functions premium plan blob storage app service bicep arm resource group

validation_smoke.name: platform.cloud.azure L3 validation smoke
signals: az role assignment list shows the principal scoped to the resource group with a single built-in role, no Owner
An Azure Function bound to a managed identity calls a resource with no connection string or secret in config
Bicep what-if reports only the intended resource changes before any deployment is applied
Blob container access level reports Private and requests over HTTP are rejected by the storage firewall

diagnosis_smoke.name: platform.cloud.azure diagnosis smoke
signals: AuthorizationFailed traced to a role assignment at the wrong scope in the management-group->subscription->RG->resource chain
Azure Functions cold start tied to the Consumption plan scale-from-zero rather than code, fixed by Premium pre-warmed instances
AKS pod cannot pull image or reach a service because the kubelet/workload managed identity lacks the AcrPull role
App Service slow or erroring after a swap because slot settings or warm-up were misconfigured
Entra ID token has the app role/scope missing, so the API returns 403 despite a valid token
